Sep 10, 2025

## Have kidney stones after regularly…

Have kidney stones after regularly consuming olipop.They cant provide any documents that saying their products is safe. "With respect to your questions about our products, every ingredient in our products is carefully selected and used at levels that are well within the generally accepted safe levels of consumption. We also test our products to ensure safety and quality. However, we do not publicly share our test results as they contain confidential information."

August 16, 2025

Unprompted review

Dec 11, 2023

## I ordered using their Amazon store and…

I ordered using their Amazon store and it did not arrive. It stated it was delivered to a mailbox (no way possible a 12 pack could fit into it) after hours. This was supposed to be delivered on Monday per instructions as it was to a business. I reached out over Amazon and directly to them. Reaching out directly to them got me nowhere.. Via Amazon they said they would replace and asked for another address then refunded me. Well, I have yet to have a refund.. they just said they did. All I wanted was to get what I ordered as its a Christmas gift. Now I am expected to re-order it all again and

## Company details

### Written by the company

Theoliepop is an Irish company that specializes in custom mugs and sweatshirts. We believe in the power of personalization and strive to offer high-quality products that our customers can make their own. Whether you're looking for a unique gift or a way to showcase your personal style, Theoliepop has something for everyone. Our mugs and sweatshirts are made with care and attention to detail, ensuring that every item we sell is of the highest quality. We are dedicated to providing excellent customer service and are always happy to work with our clients to create the perfect custom product.See more

results.title: Olipop – Reviews
results.text:
Olipop – Reviews

OL

# Olipop

Thailand

## Reviews

---

Nov 10, 2025

## Fehlende Auszahlung

Folgender Sachverhalt liegt vor...!Seit mehr als 5 Werktage warte ich auf eine Auszahlung von 104€!Bei Kontaktaufnahme, wird man steht's nur mit Ausreden vertröstet, wie zb. die Finanzabteilung hat derzeit eine hohes Aufkommen an Auszahlung und noch schlimmer die Finanzabteilung ist sich dessen bewusst aber konkrete Aussagen, wann es zu Auszahlung kommt sind Mangelware!Ich kann nur jedem abraten und ab Abstand zu nehmen von diesem Casino!

10 November 2025

Unprompted review

---

May 28, 2023

Verified

## Flotte und rasche Abwicklung

Flotte und rasche Abwicklung! Gebühren bei Kauf online viel zu hoch!😡

27 May 2023

---

Apr 1, 2023

## Hatte nie negative Erfahrungen in…

Hatte nie negative Erfahrungen hier...Bedienung easy cheedy!

1 April 2023

Unprompted review

---

Jan 13, 2023

## Klares Minus

Klares Minus: Der angegebene Preis, hält nicht das was er verspricht und entspricht zu guter letzt nach Ausfüllen aller Passagieredaten nicht dem auf der Website! Diesen Preis bekommt man rein nur mittels Sofortüberweisung mittels Klara! MIT Bezahlung per Kreditkarte etc. ist mit ca. 30 Euro mehr zu kalkulieren! Die Website ist einfach zu bedienen und zuverlässig, binnen 12 Stunden erhält man per Mail die erworbenen onlinetickets!

10 January 2023

Unprompted review

#### We use technology to protect platform integrity, but we don't fact-check reviews

While we don't verify specific claims because reviewers' opinions are their own, we may label reviews as "Verified" when we can confirm a business interaction took place. Read more

To protect platform integrity, every review on our platform—verified or not—is screened by our 24/7 automated software. This technology is designed to identify and remove content that breaches our guidelines, including reviews that are not based on a genuine experience. We recognise we may not catch everything, and you can flag anything you think we may have missed. Read more

## Review summary

Based on reviews, created with AI

Reviewers overwhelmingly had a great experience with this company. Customers consistently praise the product, highlighting its quality and natural ingredients. Many appreciate the taste, noting that the drinks are refreshing, not overly sweet, and a healthy alternative to other beverages. While there's strong agreement on the product's excellence, opinions on delivery service and order fulfillment are more varied. However, consumers generally commend the company's service, particularly their responsiveness and willingness to resolve issues.See more
